title.zh: 从腐蚀的墙面伸手、把猎物拖入私有深渊
title.en: The Old Man Reaching Through Corroded Walls

summary.zh: 外形腐朽的老年人形，可穿过固体并留下腐蚀痕迹，将受害者带入由其控制的口袋维度缓慢猎取。
summary.en: A decaying humanoid that passes through matter, spreads corrosion, and drags victims into a private dimension built for pursuit.

description.zh:
SCP-106看似一名严重腐败的老人，身体表面不断渗出能侵蚀物质的黑色液体。墙、地板和密闭门不能构成稳定阻隔；它会沉入固体，又从另一个表面探出，如同整座设施只是薄皮。被它抓住的人可能被拖进一处由其支配的口袋维度，那里的空间、时间与痛感都可被重新安排，逃生路线因狩猎者的兴趣而改变。

收容方案以层层隔离、悬空室和可牺牲诱饵构成，文件的冷酷几乎与对象本身相称。106常表现出耐心和玩弄欲，不急于杀死猎物，而是延长追逐、制造希望，再关闭出口。某些故事线尝试把它与战争、衰老或特定人物相连，但主档案没有为其提供唯一前史。这个空缺很重要：老人不是从一段悲惨传记中获得恐怖，而像建筑材料自身的腐败突然拥有了捕猎意志。只要墙面出现第一滴黑液，安全空间的概念便已先于人体被溶穿。
description.en:
SCP-106 resembles an elderly human in advanced decay, continually exuding a black substance that corrodes surrounding material. Walls, floors, and sealed doors cannot form a reliable barrier. The entity sinks into solid matter and emerges from another surface as if the entire facility were only a thin skin. Captured people may be drawn into a pocket dimension under its control, where space, time, and pain can be rearranged and escape routes change according to the hunter’s interest.

Containment uses layered isolation, a suspended chamber, and procedures involving expendable bait; the file’s institutional coldness nearly matches the object. SCP-106 displays patience and a taste for play. It does not need to kill quickly, preferring to extend pursuit, create hope, and close the exit afterward. Some tale continuities connect it to war, aging, or a particular human identity, but the main article grants no single origin. That absence matters. The Old Man does not require a tragic biography; it feels like decay inside building material has acquired the will to hunt. Once the first black stain appears, the idea of safe space has already dissolved.

value.zh: 穿过固体并进入自有维度
value.en: Passage through matter and entry into a private dimension

sources.zh: SCP-106 原始档案，作者：Dr Gears
sources.en: SCP-106 source article by Dr Gears
